title: Night Light Project
subtitle: LDR + LED: Automatic Light in Darkness
overview: Students learn how an LDR (Light Dependent Resistor) and LED work together to create an automatic night light that turns ON in darkness. Teacher demonstrates the project and students test the circuit.

images._note: Add classroom demonstration and project photos.

gallery.caption: LDR sensor detects light and darkness
Students testing the night light circuit

concept.title: How Night Light Works
concept.content: An LDR changes its resistance based on light. When it becomes dark, the circuit allows the LED to glow automatically. This creates a simple automatic night light.

activity.title: Night Light Testing Activity
steps: Teacher builds the LDR and LED circuit
Cover the LDR with your hand
Observe LED lighting up in darkness

quiz.explanation: The LED lights up when darkness is detected.

quiz.q: What is the purpose of this project?
quiz.explanation: The project creates an automatic night light.
